text.title: requirements-traceability Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for requirements-traceability as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents write the RTM directly instead of patching source artifact frontmatter.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Direct RTM edits bypass the generator and produce inconsistencies between source artifacts and the matrix; the generator must own the canonical state.

failure-mode.description: LLMs hallucinate links by associating artifacts that share a keyword but have no actual dependency.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hallucinated links poison the matrix and pass coverage thresholds while hiding real gaps. Every proposed link must cite a quoted span from each artifact as evidence; links below 0.9 confidence require human review.

failure-mode.description: Too granular tracing — linking every UI label and log message.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Over-tracing buries signal in noise; trace only at the lowest level where a defect would be material to the business or auditor.

failure-mode.description: Hand-editing the RTM instead of patching source artifact frontmatter.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Manual RTM edits bypass the generator and produce inconsistencies; the matrix must be a build product, not a hand-maintained document.

failure-mode.description: One-time traceability exercise — not updating on changes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An outdated RTM is worse than none because it gives false assurance to auditors and misleads impact analysis.

failure-mode.description: Coverage metrics gaming — linking one tautological test per requirement to achieve 100% forward coverage.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tautological links pass coverage thresholds while hiding real gaps; pair coverage metrics with mutation testing or acceptance-criteria density to detect gaming.
